entity_extraction_template: Composite key columns: ':' → 'Unnamed: 3' → 'Unnamed: 5' → 'Unnamed: 7'. Empty cells inherit the last non-empty value from the same column above. Top-level key ':' → _ entity. Second-level key 'Unnamed: 3' → Unnamed entity. Leaf key 'Unnamed: 7' → Unnamed entity.
relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (_) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (Unnamed). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: "按四分位開支組別及商品或服務類別劃分的住戶每月平均開支", "Unnamed: 4", "Unnamed: 6", "Unnamed: 8". Attach remarks columns ['表二'] as metadata properties on the leaf entity.
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key ':' defines the root entity (_).
Second-level key 'Unnamed: 3' defines child entities (Unnamed) linked to their parent via HAS_SUB_ITEM.
Leaf key 'Unnamed: 7' defines the most granular entity (Unnamed).
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
